# Survey Questions

> **Research topic**: [Describe the product, feature, or problem space]  
> **Date**: [YYYY-MM-DD]  
> **Linked hypotheses**: [List hypothesis IDs this survey validates, e.g. H1, H2, H4]  
> **Target respondents**: [Describe target user segment]  
> **Estimated completion time**: [X minutes]

---

## Hypothesis → Question Mapping

| Question ID | Hypothesis ID | Question Type |
|---|---|---|
| Q3 | H1 | Likert |
| Q4 | H2 | Multiple choice |
| Q7 | H3 | Open-ended |

---

## Section 1: Screener

*These questions determine if the respondent qualifies. Disqualify anyone who doesn't match your target segment.*

**S1.** What best describes your role?  
○ [Option A]  
○ [Option B]  
○ [Option C]  
○ Other: ____  

**S2.** How often do you use [product / feature]?  
○ Daily  
○ Several times a week  
○ Once a week  
○ A few times a month  
○ Rarely or never ← *[Disqualify if "Rarely or never"]*  

**S3.** [Additional screener question if needed — e.g. company size, tenure, specific use case]  
○ [Option A]  
○ [Option B]  

---

## Section 2: Core Validation Questions

*Maps directly to hypotheses. Each question validates or disproves one hypothesis.*

---

### [Theme: e.g. Onboarding]

**Q1.** *(H1 — Likert)* [Statement reflecting what H1 assumes users believe or feel]  
○ Strongly Agree  
○ Agree  
○ Neutral  
○ Disagree  
○ Strongly Disagree  

**Q2.** *(H2 — Multiple choice)* When you [situation related to H2], what do you typically do?  
□ [Option A]  
□ [Option B]  
□ [Option C]  
□ Other: ____  

---

### [Theme: e.g. Core Value]

**Q3.** *(H3 — Frequency)* How often do you [behavior H3 predicts]?  
○ Always  
○ Often  
○ Sometimes  
○ Rarely  
○ Never  

**Q4.** *(H4 — Likert)* [Statement reflecting H4 assumption]  
○ Strongly Agree  
○ Agree  
○ Neutral  
○ Disagree  
○ Strongly Disagree  

---

### [Additional theme if needed]

**Q5.** *(H5 — Open-ended)* What is the single biggest challenge you face when [context]?  
[Text box — short answer]

---

## Section 3: Closing

**Q6.** Of the following, which is most important to you when [context]? *(Select one)*  
○ [Priority A]  
○ [Priority B]  
○ [Priority C]  
○ [Priority D]  

**Q7.** Is there anything else about [topic] you'd like us to know?  
[Text box — open-ended]

---

## Analysis Notes

*Fill in after data collection.*

| Hypothesis | Response Distribution | Validated? | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| H1 | [summary] | Yes / No / Inconclusive | |
| H2 | [summary] | Yes / No / Inconclusive | |
| H3 | [summary] | Yes / No / Inconclusive | |
